title: stevia subpubescens
intro: Stevia subpubescens, also known as Stevia eupatoria, is a perennial plant species within the Stevia genus, native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Stevia subpubescens is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
